checks.name: skill healthcheck emits MemRL SkillRL and evolution gate
checks.cmd:
./solar-harness.sh skills healthcheck --force --no-remote --json > /tmp/solar-skill-healthcheck-evolution.json && python3 - <<'PY'
import json, pathlib
p = pathlib.Path('/tmp/solar-skill-healthcheck-evolution.json')
text = p.read_text()
start = text.find('{')
data = json.loads(text[start:])
assert data['ok'] is True
assert data['memrl_status']['implementation_exists'] is True
assert 'sys_skill_bank' in data['memrl_status']['required_tables_present']
assert data['skillrl_status']['knowledge_doc_exists'] is True
assert data['evolution_engine']['ok'] is True
assert data['evolution_gate']['promotion_allowed'] is False
assert 'external_eval_pack_not_passed' in data['evolution_gate']['promotion_blockers']
assert data['memrl_feedback']['jsonl']
PY

checks.name: skill evolution runner blocks unimplemented candidate promotion
checks.cmd:
./solar-harness.sh skills evolve run --candidate solar-prompt-residue-quarantine --eval-pack evals/packs/s5-basic/eval.json --no-remote --update-memrl --json > /tmp/solar-skill-evolution-runner.json || true; python3 - <<'PY'
import json, pathlib
p = pathlib.Path('/tmp/solar-skill-evolution-runner.json')
text = p.read_text()
start = text.find('{')
assert start >= 0, text
data = json.loads(text[start:])
assert data['selected_count'] == 1
run = data['runs'][0]
assert run['candidate'] == 'solar-prompt-residue-quarantine'
assert run['promoted'] is False
assert 'candidate_skill_not_implemented' in run['blockers']
assert run['eval']['ok'] is True
PY
